zh.Lund Wood, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾隆德 伍德
zh.Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾海姆斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas De Wortley於1318年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾沃特利時，他的父親Sir Nicholas De Wortley29歲，母親Lucy De Greystoke39歲。他於1338年與Elizabeth De Wannerville在英國越可爾巴斯利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1360年在英國英格蘭越可爾海姆斯沃斯享年42歲，埋葬在英國越可爾海姆斯沃斯。

zh-hans.Lund Wood, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾隆德 伍德
zh-hans.Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾海姆斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas De Wortley于1318年出生在英国英格兰越可爾沃特利时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas De Wortley29岁，母亲Lucy De Greystoke39岁。他于1338年与Elizabeth De Wannerville在英国越可爾巴斯利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1360年在英国英格兰越可爾海姆斯沃斯享年42岁，埋葬在英国越可爾海姆斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wortley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Wortley in Tankersley (Yorkshire), or Lower, Upper, or New Wortley in Armley (Yorkshire), or (least likely) Wortley in Wotton under Edge (Gloucestershire). The place in Tankersley derives from Old English wyrt ‘plant, vegetable’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The place in Armley derives from an Old English personal name Wyrca or Weorca + Old English lēah. The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wyrt + lēah.

variants.name: Worley
meanings: habitational name with different origins. In the West Midlands this surname is most probably derived from Great or Little Wyrley in Norton Canes (Staffordshire). The placenames derive from Old English wīr ‘bog myrtle’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. In the East Midlands, the name is possibly from Worlick in Ramsey (Huntingdonshire), the etymology of the which is uncertain. In northern England, possibly from Whirley in Over Alderley (Cheshire), which has the same etymology as the Staffordshire names. There may also be a further unlocated source of this habitational name in southern England.
possibly an irregular variant of   Wortley   or   Warley  .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas De Wortley was born in 1318, in Wortley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Nicholas De Wortley, was 29 and his mother, Lucy De Greystoke, was 39. He married Elizabeth De Wannerville in 1338, in Barnsley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1360, in Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas De Wortley est né en 1318, à Wortley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Nicholas De Wortley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lucy De Greystoke, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth De Wannerville en 1338, à Barnsley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1360, à Hemsworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Hemsworth, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas De Wortley 1318 in Wortley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas De Wortley 29 und seine Mutter Lucy De Greystoke 39. Er hat 1338 in Barnsley, Yorkshire, England Elizabeth De Wannerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1360 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas De Wortley è nato il nel 1318 nel Wortley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas De Wortley, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lucy De Greystoke, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth De Wannerville nel 1338, nel Barnsley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1360, nel Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアヘムスウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas De Wortleyが1318年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルトリーで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas De Wortleyは29歳，母Lucy De Greystokeは39歳であった。1338年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバーンスリーでElizabeth De Wannervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1360年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヘムスウオルスで42歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヘムスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas De Wortley(이)가 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 워틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas De Wortley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy De Greystoke(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1338년 영국 요르크실르 바른슬리에서 Elizabeth De Wannerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 헤스워스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 헤스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas De Wortley nasceu em 1318, em Wortley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Nicholas De Wortley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lucy De Greystoke, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth De Wannerville em 1338, em Barnsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1360, em Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas De Wortley родился в 1318 г. в местности вортли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas De Wortley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy De Greystoke, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth De Wannerville в 1338 г. в местности барнсли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1360 г. в местности хемсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности хемсворт, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas De Wortley nació en 1318, en Wortley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Nicholas De Wortley, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lucy De Greystoke, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Elizabeth De Wannerville en 1338, en Barnsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1360, en Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
